title: ライスのトリック大作戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I have an unending case of the hiccups today.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Did you just hiccup?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Did you just hiccup?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, hiccups are kinda funny. I like how you
bounce and make noise even though you're not
doing anything.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Negligence is the greatest enemy. They say you
can develop a serious illness if you let hiccups
continue unabated.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? R-really?! Oh no! Are you okay, Big
Brother?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat? R-really?! Oh no! Are you okay, Big
Sister?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I got it! They'll go away if you're scared, right?!
Take this, Big Brother! Bwah! Oooh! Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I got it! They'll go away if you're scared, right?!
Take this, Big Sister! Bwah! Oooh! Yaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Current tactics deemed ineffective. I suggest a
stronger element of surprise.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
O-oh... I see. Then, I'll do my best to be more
surprising!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm... coming... Ready... here I am!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Urara, la la la! ♪ Hi, Rice! Whatcha doin'?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I got it! You're playing hide-and-seek! I wanna
play!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-h-hold on a second. It's not hide-and-seek...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-boo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Why are you still hiccupping?! Grr! Stop
it, hiccups! Go away!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing situation. Conclusion—impact
insufficient. To apply status "surprised" to your
trainer, you require both more volume and force.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've got it this time... As soon as Big Brother comes by,
I'm going to leap out of the shed!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I've got it this time... As soon as Big Sister comes by, I'm
going to leap out of the shed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clatter! Click!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-huh? The door won't open! Nooo, why?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I'll be able to surprise anyone like
this. I'm useless... as usual.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This way, Rice. I know how to increase the success
rate of your strategy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you for waiting.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
From my observations, I have determined that
Rice's overwhelming kindness has rendered her
unable to surprise you.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I have taken it upon myself to make
modifications.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
If she were to become a cyborg with a steel heart,
then her likelihood of success would improve
dramatically.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It seem that news does not faze you. I have
determined overly exaggerated setting are the
cause. Mission failure.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-boo!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Oh... Did I... Did I actually surprise you? Did
your... hiccups stop?
choice_data_list: I think my heart's gonna stop too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: R-really? Yay!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Our tactic of striking once the target let their
guard down was successful. Mission accomplished.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for your help, Bourbon! I couldn't have
done it without you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If it was just me, Big Brother would probably have
kept hiccupping forever and ever and ever...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
If it was just me, Big Sister would probably have
kept hiccupping forever and ever and ever...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sniffle. I'm so glad! Thank you so much, Bourbon!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if it was just hiccups, I'm grateful that these
two would work so hard to help me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Did we scare you too much?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what should we do?! How do you cancel out
surprise?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I believe one must offer reassurance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Creek informed me that saying "there, there" or a
pat on the head can be effective.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
G-got it. Just like Creek would do... There,
there... there, there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, Rice Shower has thrown herself into
reassuring me.
